rows.name: Claims fraud detection at FNOL
rows.pain: Manual SIU referral misses est. 30% of fraud; avg detection lag 45 days

rows.name: Claims document intake automation
rows.pain: 12 min average manual re-keying per claim

rows.name: Customer service copilot
rows.pain: Average handle time 8.5 min; 30% of calls transferred

rows.name: Subrogation opportunity detection
rows.pain: Recovery opportunities missed in ~15% of eligible claims
